relations.note: Both govern how assembled sections are structured and sequenced.

quotes: Generous white space; clean, never cluttered.
"Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

rules.intent: Keep layouts uncluttered and focus attention on one key element per section.
rules.rule_text: Maintain generous white space and clean, never-cluttered layouts. Limit focal points per section — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element. "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

quotes: so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge
Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.
section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

rules.intent: Prevent adjacent sections from merging by alternating declared background colors.
rules.rule_text: Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern): alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. [GENERAL] Section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern

Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

rules.intent: Standardize the canonical content block and anchor all materials to the patient brochure reference.
rules.rule_text: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern, per the patient brochure — which is the reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials.
